ValidationRule.description: checks to see if start is within 5 days of a holiday
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ABS(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c - DATE(2025, 1, 1) ) <= 5, /* New Year's Day */ ABS( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c - DATE(2025, 1, 20) ) <= 5, /* MLK Day */ ABS( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c - DATE(2025, 11, 27) ) <= 5, /* Thanksgiving Day */ ABS( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c - DATE(2025, 11, 28) ) <= 5, /* Day After Thanksgiving */ ABS( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c - DATE(2025, 12, 24) ) <= 5, /* Christmas Eve */ ABS( Target_Contract_Start_Date__c - DATE(2025, 12, 25) ) <= 5 /* Christmas Day */ )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Start Date cannot be within 5 days of a holiday.
